title: Fast Paths Together
description: Get move speed on dirt_path and polished blocks. Boost players and and vehicles.
body:
Travelers grants you (and your vehicle) move speed on dirt_path and polished blocks! ## Main features - **Grants speed effect on dirt_path and polished blocks** (default: +30%) - Possibility to hide the polished blocks/slab underground (at player y-2) and get the speed effect as well. This allow you to create path designs of your own, and still get the speed effect. - Vehicles are also affected by the speed effect. - Speed boost is given with an attribute, so it is compatible and additive with speed potions. ## Autopath Generator (**DISABLED**) This system is now DISABLED by default. It is an experimental feature that spawn a lot of markers on the grass, where people walk. So, it doesn't suit servers or multiplayer very well as it can build up the entity count very fast. Still, the feature is pretty cool, so you can enable it (and deal with the consequences!) ``` /scoreboard players set AutoPath fktvl.options 1 ``` - The auto-path generator turn grass_block into dirt_path after few steps on the block. (should be disabled on large server) - Auto-path renew: go back to grass if players no longer use this path. - Auto-path overload: if too many players, path may turn into dirt, or mud if it's rainy. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fktvl:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
Issue / Bug IF you 're using the AutoPath system (default disabled): it require entities (marker) on scoreboard: you might have to turn it on if using Spigot/Paper.
